info.title: vuforia
info.description:
The Vuforia Web Services (VWS) CLI is a command-line interface that enables developers to manage targets in their content management system. Key functionalities include:
			- Listing all targets in the database
			- Retrieving details for a specific target
			- Inserting new targets
			- Updating existing targets
			- Deleting targets
			- Checking for similar targets
			- Generating summary reports
			- Getting a summary of the database
